message:
bd-15y6: Implement model_dump() with all options

Add Pydantic-style model dump/serialization functionality:

- DumpMode enum: Json (default), Python
- DumpOptions struct: include, exclude, by_alias, exclude_none, etc.
- ModelDump trait: blanket impl for Serialize types
- model_dump(): main serialization entry point
- model_dump_json(): convenience for JSON string output
- model_dump_json_pretty(): pretty-printed JSON output

Features:
- Field inclusion/exclusion filters
- Exclude null/None values
- Builder pattern for DumpOptions
- Proper error handling with serde_json::Error

Tests:
- test_model_dump_default
- test_model_dump_json
- test_model_dump_json_pretty
- test_model_dump_include
- test_model_dump_exclude
- test_model_dump_exclude_none
- test_dump_options_builder
- test_dump_mode_default
- test_model_dump_include_exclude_combined

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
